nasb.text: Likewise, I want women to adorn themselves with proper clothing, modestly and discreetly, not with braided hair and gold or pearls or costly garments,

esv.text: likewise also that women should adorn themselves in respectable apparel, with modesty and self-control, not with braided hair and gold or pearls or costly attire,

cnv.text: 照樣，我也願意女人以端正、嫻淑、自律為裝飾；不要以鬈髮、金飾、珠寶，或名貴衣裳為裝飾，

ccb.text: 我愿女人衣着朴素端庄，不靠发型、珠宝金饰或名贵衣服来妆饰自己，

csbs.text: 照样，我也希望女人衣着端庄，以廉耻和自制来装饰自己；不以编发、金饰、珍珠或极其贵重的衣裳来装饰自己，
